summary.lv: IT Camp partnera Fintech uzņēmums meklē pieredzējušu Infrastructure Architect ar DevOps pieredzi, lai vadītu IT infrastruktūras modernizāciju uz mākoni un automatizētu operācijas.
summary.en: IT Camp's Fintech client seeks an experienced Infrastructure Architect with hands-on DevOps skills to lead IT infrastructure modernization and drive cloud and automation best practices.
